name: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc.
description: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. is one of the largest surface transportation and logistics companies in North America. Founded in 1961 and headquartered in Lowell, Arkansas, the company provides a wide range of supply chain solutions, including intermodal, dedicated contract carriage, full truckload, and brokerage services. J.B. Hunt is a leader in the intermodal industry, operating an extensive fleet of containers and chassis while maintaining strong partnerships with major rail carriers. The company leverages advanced technology through its J.B. Hunt 360°® platform to optimize freight matching and enhance efficiency for shippers and carriers alike.

investment_theses.company_type: Logistics / Intermodal & Trucking for US Supply Chain
